Hey, how's it going guys? Going to go through a quick overview of managing your Google Drive. It's pretty self-explanatory. You can really, once you go into Google Drive, you can even just go to Drive, go in there, go to Google Drive. Once you go in there, you can navigate to your different files. You might drive or team drives. Once you go into there, there's different files that you can really do some different actions on. Like I said, it's pretty self-explanatory. But say if you want to share it with one of your teammates, you can get a share of a link. So you can basically just click that and turn it on and then basically just copy and send that link over to someone. You can also add it to specific people if you do share. So you can do here and just type in whoever's email. Then you can also see who already has access. Say if someone has access and you want to remove them from having access, you can go here and basically just click there and remove them. So definitely some pretty useful stuff. As far as managing documents, you know, send your team and stuff like that. So you're not emailing documents back and forth. It's really good version control too since you can actually both be inside of an Excel sheet and you can both be making changes and doing edits. It'll actually update in real time. So it's almost like you're working on an Excel at the same time and you can see their changes as you go. So it's really good stuff there. I'm not, you know, I'm not going to go into too much detail. Like I said, it's pretty self-explanatory. So, so yeah, feel free to kind of navigate around and get a feel for it. But I don't think too many will have too much trouble with this, but awesome.
